title: pollinia irritans
intro: Pollinia irritans is a plant species also known as 'stinging nettle' or 'nettle tree', which is characterized by its sharp stinging hairs that can cause skin irritation. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin irritations. Its health benefits include reducing pain, swelling, and inflammation, as well as acting as a natural antacid and digestive aid. In herbal preparations, Pollinia irritans can be made into a tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
